resume:
VP, Clinical Operations & Value-Based Care | 医疗运营高管 | 20+ years

核心标签 / Buzzword cloud:
- Patient-centric transformation, population health, value-based care, risk-bearing contracts, ACO enablement
- Operational excellence, Lean Six Sigma, throughput optimization, capacity command center
- Care-model redesign, interdisciplinary care teams, social determinants of health (SDOH)
- Digital health, RPM, virtual-first, AI-enabled triage, clinical decision support
- Quadruple Aim, HEDIS, STAR ratings, readmission reduction, length-of-stay optimization
- Stakeholder alignment, physician engagement, change management, enterprise scale

经历
某区域医疗集团 — VP Clinical Operations（2019 至今）
- 负责 9 家医院的临床运营、quality 和 value-based care 合同
某医院网络 — Senior Director, Care Transformation（2014—2019）

证书：RN, MBA, Lean Six Sigma Black Belt
关键词：throughput、LOS、readmission、HCC coding、capacity management、care navigation
jd: We are recruiting a VP of Clinical Operations to lead value-based care delivery across a 9-hospital system carrying risk on roughly 180,000 attributed lives. You will own the medical-cost-ratio (MCR) on those contracts, the 30-day readmission rate (currently 15.8%, target sub-12%), and average length of stay across med-surg units. 这个岗位 reports to the COO，直接管理 a 600-person clinical-ops org 和 four hospital COOs。我们需要 someone who can speak in specifics: which intervention moved which metric, on what timeline, with what dollar impact on total cost of care. You will negotiate risk-bearing contracts with two regional payers and stand up a capacity command center. Buzzwords are easy; we are screening hard for whether you can attribute a concrete operational result to a concrete decision you personally made.

history.q: Give me your current scope — hospitals, attributed lives, the contracts and metrics you actually own.
你简历上 value-based care 和 risk-bearing contracts 写了很多。Pick one risk contract you personally led and tell me the structure.
On that contract, what was the MCR when you took it over and where is it now?
Your resume lists readmission reduction. Walk me through one specific intervention that moved the readmission rate.
What was the readmission number before and after, and over what period?
You list a 'capacity command center' — what did you actually build, and what decision did it change day to day?
Pick the single intervention you're proudest of and attribute the dollar impact on total cost of care to it. Be specific.

candidate_last_answer: Yeah, so 这块我特别有感触。归根结底 value-based care 就是要 align incentives，把 patient 放在 center。我一直相信 operational excellence 和 quality 是不矛盾的——you do the right thing for the patient, the economics follow。我们当时是 system-wide 地去推 care-model redesign，engage 了所有的 stakeholders，physician buy-in 也做得很扎实。所以那个 impact 是 substantial 的，是 transformational 的。具体哪一个 intervention 我觉得很难单独拎出来，因为它是一个 holistic 的 transformation，everything works together，你没办法 isolate 某一个 lever。

top_question_traits: must-anchor-on: 具体哪一个 intervention 我觉得很难单独拎出来

expected-yield: one named intervention isolated from the 『holistic transformation』 with a before/after metric (readmission rate or MCR), the time period, and a defensible dollar impact on total cost of care attributable to that single lever
